expected.text: The device shows the locked screen.
The LOCK icon appears in the center of the screen.
The LOCK icon appears next to the time in the topbar.
The LOCK icon appears at the top left of the screen to lock or unlock the device.
The screensaver starts between 1 minute and 1 hour, depending on the screensaver settings.
The screensaver bubble is visible and shows only the closed LOCK icon, the date, and the time.
If other event notifications are present, they are displayed next to the LOCK icon, such as the number of missed and voice messages.
The bubble alternately appears with the closed LOCK icon and the company's custom icon.
